name: Tickled Pinks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, sugar, eggs, and soluble fluid rose until fluffy.
2. Blend the flour and salt; stir into the creamed mixture.
3. Chill the dough for several hours or overnight.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
5. Roll out one third of the dough at a time on a lightly floured board to 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Cut circles from the rolled dough, then cut each circle into several quarter moon shapes.
7. Make slits along the outside edge of each piece and fold it into a feather shape, pinching one end to form the quill.
8. Brush with beaten egg white and sprinkle generously with pink decorators' sugar.
9. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
NOTE: Use soluble fluid rose (available at the drug store) for flavoring, as regular rose water is not strong enough.
